body_transformation: The shell transforms into cracked obsidian plates with molten gold seams and ember-scaled armor plating along its edges, while the white neck band becomes a band of glowing amber. The tail tip now tapers into a flame-shaped ember with molten gold streaks, and the ears gain heat-haze distortion around their edges. The short legs develop magma-cracked textures with charcoal black accents, and the rounded head features subtle smoke trails emanating from its nostrils.
signature_feature: Shell: cracked obsidian plates with molten gold seams and ember-scaled armor plating.
